'''Taraloon''' was an uncharted [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that served as base of operations of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Drek Drednar]] and his crew, who had built a [[Taraloon Pirate Complex|base]] there. Native to the planet were the reptilian [[Gornalak]].<ref name="SaD" />

Located deep inside the [[Quintar Nebula/Legends|Quintar Nebula]], Taraloon's existence had remained unknown since the beginning of the history of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was discovered by accident by Drek Drednar, who escaped into the nebula, being chased by an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] called the [[Annihilator (Imperial I-class)|''Annihilator'']]. Successfully hiding in the nebula, Drednar and his crew stumbled upon the small planet.<ref name="SaD" />

The world was covered with plateaus and canyons. When exploring it, Drednar and his crew discovered that it also had a vast subterranean system of tunnels and large caves with underground lakes, rivers and vegetation as well as some fauna, including the Gornalak. Drednar deemed this planet the perfect hiding place for a pirate such as himself and established a base there.<ref name="SaD" />

While the surrounding nebula would normally be extremely dangerous to navigate through, it was no problem for the uncanny skills of Drednar's astronavigator [[Tron Nixx]] to plot save courses through.<ref name="SaD" />

The planet was named in honor of Nixx who hailed from [[Corlass]], "taraloon" being the Corlassi term for "hidden treasure".<ref name="SaD" />
